name.ja: <ruby>地<rt>ち</rt></ruby><ruby>霊<rt>れい</rt></ruby><ruby>術<rt>じゅつ</rt></ruby><ruby>師<rt>し</rt></ruby>アウス

requirement.en: During your Main Phase that you Normal or Special Summoned this card, send 1 monster from your hand or field to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard. Then, you can Special Summon 1 Level 5 or lower monster from your Graveyard face-up to your field. This turn, you cannot activate the effect of "Aussa the Earth Spiritualist".
